gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/427)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/427)
text: سَمِعْتُ جَعْفَرَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يَا عَلِيُّ مُرْ نِسَاءَكَ لَا يُصَلِّينَ عُطُلًا وَ لَوْ يُعَلِّقْنَ فِي أَعْنَاقِهِنَّ سَيْراً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Al Noman, from Artat Bin Habeeb, from Abu Maryam Al Ansary who said,

‘I heard Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> Bin Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Ali<sup>asws</sup>! Order your womenfolk not to perform Salat (Pray) without having dressed up well and not to use a necklace which is made of skin’.
en.sarwar: 57. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn al-Nu’man from Artat ibn Habib from abu Maryam al-Ansariy who has said the following: “I once heard Ja’far ibn Muhammad, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, said, ‘O Ali, instruct your women not to perform Salat (prayer) without having dressed well and not to use a necklace which is made of skin.’”
